usage: setOutboundReport [-help] -delay {early late both} [-filename_prefix <string>] [-report_constant_nets {true false}] [-type {lower upper both}]

options.name: -delay
options.description: Control whether extrapolation information is to be shown for min or max (or both) analyses

options.name: -filename_prefix
options.description: Specify the prefix to be used in the name(s) of the report file(s)

options.name: -report_constant_nets
options.description: Control whether extrapolation information is to be shown for constant nets or not

options.name: -type
options.description: Control whether extrapolation information is to be shown for lower or upper(or both) outbound slews
